arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersions>true</ManagePackageVersions>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I need to create a Directory.Packages.props file and convert all projects to CPM. Let me identify the packages and their highest versions:

- System.Text.Json: 10.0.1 (Api, Shared, Tests) vs 8.0.4 (Worker) → **10.0.1**
- Azure.Identity: 1.13.2 (Api) vs 1.11.4 (Shared) → **1.13.2**
- Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting: 8.0.1 (Worker) → **8.0.1**


- OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting: 1.15.0 (Worker) → **1.15.0**
- xunit: 2.9.3 (Tests) → **2.9.3**

I'll create the Directory.Packages.props file with centralized version management enabled, then strip out all the individual version declarations from the project files.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersions>true</ManagePackageVersions>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.content:
Done. Here's what I did:

**Created `Directory.Packages.props`** with `ManagePackageVersions` enabled, resolving version conflicts by picking the highest version:

| Package | Versions found | Selected |
|---|---|---|
| Azure.Identity | 1.11.4, 1.13.2 | **1.13.2** |
| System.Text.Json | 8.0.4, 10.0.1 | **10.0.1** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | 8.0.1 |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | 1.15.0 |
| xunit | 2.9.3 | 2.9.3 |

**Removed `Version` attributes** from all `PackageReference` entries in the 4 `.csproj` files.
